_about: External cross-modal D*-Ktrans evidence; literature only (no in-repo data). Corroborating strand of the D*-orphaned thread; spine is the in-repo anchors.

rows.quote: relatively weak correlations between D* and Ktrans (r = 0.389; p < 0.001)
no significant correlation between ... D* and Ktrans

framing: weak and cohort-inconsistent (significant in Sun 2019; null in Yang 2019)
role: corroborating (not load-bearing); the perfusion signal that does recover tracks the composite f*D* (and f), not D* alone.
